titel: The European Commission is presenting a funding package to support Montenegro's accession to the European Union.
html: Press release from the European Commission, Brussels, June 30, 2026. Today, the European Commission adopted a funding package that establishes the budgetary rules that will apply to Montenegro when the country becomes a member of the European Union. Montenegro is making progress in its accession process, and this proposal marks an important step on the country's path towards becoming part of the Union, following the recent agreement between Member States to begin drafting the accession treaty.
tldr: The European Union has developed a plan outlining how Montenegro will receive funding and adhere to regulations when the country becomes a member of the EU. This is an important step towards Montenegro's integration into the union.
lattlast:
The European Commission, the EU body responsible for economic and political affairs, has developed a package of funding and regulations for Montenegro. The purpose is to prepare the country for the economic rules that apply to all countries within the EU.

This decision is significant because it demonstrates that Montenegro is making good progress in its accession process. It indicates that the EU member states have decided to begin work on the final agreement for membership.

Through this package, Montenegro will receive clear guidelines on how to manage its finances and economy once it joins the union. This is a concrete step forward towards the country becoming part of European cooperation.
